text: 13. PERFORMANCE: Subcontractor agrees to perform the sublet work in a careful, good and workmanlike manner in accordance with the best construction practices and with this subcontract, and in strict accordance with the Prime Contract, and to assume and discharge all responsibilities which Contractor has assumed under the Prime Contract with respect to the sublet work, except as otherwise  provided  herein.  Subcontractor  agrees  to  procure  materials  and  supplies  in  advance  and  to  provide  sufficient  men, equipment and supervision to ensure that the sublet work will be prosecuted diligently and coordinated with other work at the site and completed within the time allotted and in accordance with the requirements of the Prime Contract. Subcontractor has satisfied himself,  by  his  own  investigation  and  research,  regarding  all  conditions  affecting  the  work  to  be  done  and  materials  to  be furnished,  and  as  to  the  meaning  and  intention  of  the  Prime  Contract.  Subcontractor  acknowledges  and  agrees  that  safety violations  shall  be  grounds  for  termination  for  cause  hereunder.  Subcontractor  is  aware  that  overtime  may  be  necessary,  at Subcontractor's expense, if Subcontractor's lack of progress is apparent to Contractor, in Contractor's reasonable judgment, as insufficient  to  allow  Subcontractor's  completion  of  the  work  within  the  agreed  scheduled  duration  of  time.  If  required  by  the Contractor, Subcontractor will provide a detailed manpower schedule showing that adequate manpower is being furnished.
